native-mode-help: Use the tabs at the top to switch views. Use the Android Back button to go back or open game actions.
reconnect-server-restarting: The server is restarting. Reconnecting shortly.
reconnect-failed: Could not reconnect. Please log in again.
network-invalid-url: The server address is invalid. Use ws:// or wss://.
sv-disabled-announcement: Self-voicing off. Native screen reader mode active.
chat-input-label: Chat input. Turn on your screen reader here if you need native text entry.
voice-chat-listen-only: Joined Voice Chat. You are listening only.
voice-chat-unavailable: Voice Chat is not available right now.
voice-chat-sdk-missing: Voice Chat support is not installed in this client.
voice-chat-connect-failed: Temporarily unable to connect to Voice Chat.
voice-chat-left-table: You left the table and left Voice Chat.
voice-chat-mic-denied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone permission to speak in voice chat.
voice-chat-mic-unsupported: This device cannot enable the microphone for voice chat.
voice-chat-mic-permission-denied: Microphone permission was denied. You can still listen in voice chat, but speaking will stay unavailable until microphone access is allowed.
background-service-gameplay: Game connection is active in the background.
background-service-voice: Voice Chat is active in the background.
background-service-voice-mic: Your voice chat microphone is active.
background-service-audio: Game audio is active in the background.
battery-optimization-message: Allow PlayAural to ignore Android battery optimizations so games, voice chat, and audio can keep running reliably when the app is minimized.
battery-optimization-settings-opened: Battery optimization settings opened. Allow PlayAural to run without battery restrictions.
battery-optimization-settings-unavailabl: Battery optimization settings could not be opened. You can change this later in Android settings.
voice-not-at-table: You have not joined a table yet. Join a table before starting voice chat.
voice-not-in-context: You are no longer at that table. Rejoin the table before starting voice chat.
voice-invalid-context: The requested voice chat is no longer available.
voice-unavailable: Voice Chat is not available right now.
voice-rate-limited: Slow down. Voice Chat is changing too quickly right now.
voice-muted-seconds: You are muted and cannot join Voice Chat. {seconds} seconds remaining.
voice-muted-minutes: You are muted and cannot join Voice Chat. {minutes} minutes remaining.
voice-muted-permanent: You are muted and cannot join Voice Chat.
voice-status-connected: {player} connected to the table's voice chat.
voice-status-connection-lost: {player} lost connection and was removed from the voice chat.
voice-status-left-table: {player} left the table and left the voice chat.
chat-placeholder: Type a message, or /g message to send it globally
auth-register-required: Please enter a username, email, and password to register.
auth-reset-required: Please enter your email, reset code, and new password.
auth-request-failed: The request could not be completed.
auth-register-success: Registration successful! You can now log in with your credentials.
auth-forgot-success: An email with a 6-digit reset code has been sent to your address.
auth-registration-success: Registration successful! You can now log in with your credentials.
auth-username-taken: Username already taken. Please choose a different username.
auth-username-reserved-bot: This name is reserved for PlayAural bots. Please choose a different username.
auth-registration-error: Registration failed due to a server error. Please try again.
auth-error-version-mismatch: Client version mismatch. The server has been updated to a newer version. Please update the app to continue.
auth-error-username-length: Username must be between 3 and 30 characters.
auth-error-username-invalid-chars: Username may only contain letters, numbers, and spaces. Do not use consecutive spaces or special characters.
auth-error-password-weak: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain both letters and numbers.
auth-error-rate-limit: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
error-email-empty: Email is mandatory and cannot be empty.
error-email-invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
error-email-taken: This email is already in use by another account.
error-rate-limit-login: Too many failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.
error-rate-limit-register: You have reached the maximum number of account registrations for today.
error-smtp-not-configured: Password recovery is currently disabled by the administrator.
error-email-not-found: No account found with that email address.
success-reset-email-sent: A reset code has been sent to your email address.
error-smtp-send-failed: Failed to send the reset email. Please try again later.
success-password-reset: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in.
auth-account-clear-failed: Could not remove the saved account.
update-required-status: A newer app version is required: {value}.
update-required-message: A new version ({value}) is available. Choose Update to open the latest Android APK download. Cancel will close the app.
sounds-update-required-status: A newer sound pack is required: {value}.
sounds-update-required-message: Your bundled sounds are version {current}, but the server requires version {latest}. This mobile client cannot update sounds live, so update the APK to continue. Cancel will close the app.
logout-message: Do you want to log out and close PlayAural Mobile?
session-kicked: You were kicked from the server.
footer-gestures-line-1: Self-voicing uses screen-reader-style gestures. Turn off TalkBack after connecting if you want PlayAural to control speech directly.
footer-gestures-line-2: 1-finger swipes move between items; swipe and hold for half a second to keep moving. Double-tap activates; double-tap and hold sends the modified action. 2-finger swipes open Back, Chat, History, or Shortcuts. 2-finger tap stops speech. 3-finger up or down jumps to the first or last item. 3-finger triple-tap toggles self-voicing.
